name: Dxn Limited
analysis: DXN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.1400, stop A$0.0198, target A$0.2200 (0.67:1) — then trail it.
